title: Anvil Dropper
description: Drops an anvil on you every 2 seconds
body:
# Anvil Dropper

This custom challenge will summon an anvil 10 blocks above you every 2 seconds, forcing you to either seek shelter, or be on the move constantly.

To start the challenge, simply run `/trigger anvil_active` and start running.

This data pack was originally made for version 1.17, but it still works up to 1.20.4 (and probably later versions if you're reading this in the future).
